calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion For Award Of Atty'S Fees
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Colection Bureau's Motion for Attorney Fees.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
No appearance by defendant Bidric, inc., a California corporation.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, plaintiff's motion for attorney fees is GRANTED. Defendant Bidric, Inc., a California corporation, shall pay plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, $9,000.00 in attorney fees.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Gary Looney, President of Creditors Trade Association, Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Bidric, Inc., a California corporation.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was initially filed on October 31, 2009, which set a trial date of February 3, 2009. Matter was continued serveral times. Notice of Continuation of Trial, filed on November 16, 2009, set trial for today, January 25, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defenant Kris C. Bosmans, a/k/a Kris Bosmans, a/k/a BB Slamm, individually, was filed on January 4, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Matthes S. Simpson, a/k/a Matt S. Simpson, a/k/a Sutherland Simpson, a/k/a matt Simpson, individually, was filed on December 10, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 6, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau, and against defendant Bidric, Inc., a California corporation as follows:

Principal - $55,980.19.
Interest - $4,003.74.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $380.00.

Total - $60,363.93.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2009 Continued To Jan-25-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Matters To Be Deemed Admitted For Failure To Timely Respond To Requests For Admissions And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Robert F. Cohen, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Creditors Trade association, Inc.
Matthew Simpson and Kris Bosmans; defendants and opposing party, in Propria Persona

Hearing held on Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion for matters to be deemed admitted for failure to timely respond to requests for admissions and for sanctions
Ruling:
1- Motion for matters to be deemend admitted Denied.
In the alternative, the Court orders defendants to serve verified responses to plaintiff's second set of request for admissions
2. Sanctions shall issue in the sum of $390.00, jointly and severally against each defendant, and payable within thirty days of notice of entry of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Continued To Oct-19-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Order To Continue Trial Date And To Reopen Discovery And Extend Discovery Cutoff
Off Calendar Jun-17-2009 Text Ruling

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Req. For Production Of Documents; Req.'S For Admissions And Reqponses To Pltf'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories; Form Interrogatories And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted.
Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s
Motion to compel response to request for production of documents; request for admissions and responses to plaintiff's first set of special interrogatories; form interrogatories; and award of monetary sanctions granted as follows:
1. All objections to the specified discovery are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
a. Within seven days of the date of service of this order, each defendant shall serve full, complete, verified responses to plaintiff's form interrogatories, special interrogatories, and request for production of documents;
2. The matters set forth in plaintiff's request for admissions as to each defendant are deemed admitted;
3. Request for an award of monetary sanctions is granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, against Kris C. Bosmans, an individual; and $290.00 against defendant Matthew S. Simpson, an individual; payable within thirty days of the date of service of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Continued To Jun-22-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Continue Trial
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Text Ruling
